title: Senior iOS Engineer
companyDescription: Vela builds shared transit software used by city operators across South and Southeast Asia. Small team, lots of ownership, and a refreshingly grown-up engineering culture.
description: We're looking for an iOS engineer to take ownership of our driver and rider apps. You'll partner closely with backend and product to ship features end-to-end, mentor two junior engineers, and influence the direction of our mobile architecture.
requirements: 5+ years shipping production iOS apps in Swift
Strong grasp of SwiftUI, async/await and modern concurrency
Comfortable working without a tech lead holding your hand
Bonus: prior experience with maps or real-time data

title: iOS Engineer, Payments
companyDescription: Northwind is a mid-sized digital bank serving small businesses in the UK and Ireland. Engineering reports directly to the COO and ships every week.
description: Join the payments squad to help us rebuild the card-management experience. The work spans card issuance, dispute flows, and a chunky migration from UIKit to SwiftUI on a high-traffic surface.
requirements: 3+ years iOS engineering
Comfortable reading and refactoring legacy UIKit
Care about correctness — payments code has to be right
Familiarity with feature flags and staged rollouts

title: Junior iOS Developer
companyDescription: Brightseed builds learning tools for K-12 classrooms. Calm pace, strong mentorship, and meaningful work.
description: A great spot to start your career. You'll pair with senior engineers, ship small features on day one, and gradually take on larger pieces of the codebase.
requirements: Some iOS / Swift experience (portfolio, internship or side project)
Curious and willing to ask questions
Comfortable receiving and acting on code review feedback

title: Staff iOS Engineer
companyDescription: Atlas builds clinician-facing tooling used by hospitals across the US. Series C, ~120 engineers.
description: Set the technical direction for our iOS platform. You'll own architecture decisions, drive a multi-quarter modularization effort, and act as the senior-most iOS voice in design reviews.
requirements: 8+ years of iOS, with at least 2 in a staff-equivalent role
Track record of leading large cross-team initiatives
Strong opinions on modularization, build performance, and testing
Healthcare or other regulated-industry experience is a plus

title: iOS Contractor – SwiftUI Migration
companyDescription: Boutique consultancy. We get parachuted into client codebases to unblock thorny problems.
description: 6-month engagement helping a fintech client migrate three flagship screens from UIKit to SwiftUI without freezing feature work on the rest of the app.
requirements: Senior iOS engineer, comfortable contracting
Deep SwiftUI knowledge — interop with UIKit specifically
Can produce a written migration plan, not just code
Available 30+ hours per week from July

title: Mobile QA Engineer (iOS)
companyDescription: Vela builds shared transit software used by city operators across South and Southeast Asia.
description: Own end-to-end quality for our iOS apps. You'll build out automated UI test coverage, partner with engineering on flaky test triage, and own release sign-off.
requirements: 3+ years of mobile QA, with iOS as the primary platform
Hands-on with XCUITest or similar
Comfortable filing high-quality bug reports and reproducible cases

title: iOS Engineer, Media
companyDescription: Loudbird is a podcast network and player used by ~3M monthly listeners.
description: Help us rebuild the playback stack. You'll work close to AVFoundation, design a robust offline-first download manager, and shape how millions of episodes get from server to ear.
requirements: 4+ years iOS
Hands-on with AVFoundation, background downloads, or audio sessions
Comfortable debugging weird device-specific issues
